---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for VIO 83 AI Orchestra
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: vio83
---

## Problem
A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this feature and how?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add mockups, screenshots, links, or any other context.

## Would You Sponsor This Feature?
- [ ] Yes, I'd consider sponsoring priority development
- [ ] I'd like to contribute code for this feature
- [ ] Just a suggestion
